name: Immersal
description: Visual positioning system (VPS) and spatial mapping SDK for centimeter-accurate device localization in large indoor and outdoor AR scenes.

seo.title: Immersal — Maps / Geolocation / Routing
seo.meta_description: Immersal: Visual positioning system (VPS) and spatial mapping SDK for centimeter-accurate device localization in large indoor and outdoor AR scenes.

when_to_use: AR wayfinding in shopping malls, airports, and venues
Visual positioning system for industrial AR inspection apps
Mapping and localizing spaces for persistent AR content
Unity SDK for world-locked augmented reality experiences

pros: Acquired by Hexagon, backed by capital
cons: Competes with Google ARCore Geospatial API
review.verdict: Strong VPS pick for venue-scale AR; ARCore Geospatial is catching up for outdoor use cases.
review.best_for: Enterprise AR projects at specific venues requiring pre-mapping
review.not_for: Consumer AR apps needing global outdoor coverage

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
